<!-- START AUTOGENERATED KEY ELEMENTS -->
<b>USCDI+ Quality Elements:</b>
<ul>
<li>identifier: (USCDI+ Quality) Business Identifiers that are specific to a role/location</li>
<li>identifier.system: (USCDI+ Quality) The namespace for the identifier value</li>
<li>identifier.value: (USCDI+ Quality) The value that is unique</li>
<li>practitioner: (USCDI+ Quality) Practitioner that is able to provide the defined services for the organization</li>
<li>code: (USCDI+ Quality) Roles which this practitioner may perform</li>
<li>specialty: (USCDI+ Quality) Specific specialty of the practitioner</li>
<li>location: (USCDI+ Quality) The location(s) at which this practitioner provides care</li>
<li>telecom: (USCDI+ Quality) Contact details that are specific to the role/location/service</li>
<li>telecom.system: (USCDI+ Quality) phone | fax | email | pager | url | sms | other</li>
<li>telecom.value: (USCDI+ Quality) The actual contact point details</li>
</ul>
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED KEY ELEMENTS -->
